demo.title: From analysis to action, in one message

conversations.userMessage: Analyze TSMC's latest earnings. Add to watchlist if worth tracking, and alert me at a fair price
conversations.aiResponse:
TSMC (2330) Analysis:

2025 Q3 EPS NT$17.44 (YoY +39%), trailing 4Q total NT$61.2. Current price NT$1,915, P/E ~31x. Jan revenue NT$401.3B (YoY +36.8%), growth remains strong but decelerating.

✅ Added to "Close Watch" watchlist
✅ Price alert set: notify at NT$1,800
✅ Note saved: 2025Q3 EPS 17.44, P/E 31x, watch for growth slowdown

platforms.title: Get Started

claudeAi.title: Claude.ai
claudeAi.description: Use directly on the web, the easiest way to start
claudeAi.step1: Click the button below, or go to Claude.ai Settings → Connectors
claudeAi.step2: Enter the name fugle and paste the Fugle MCP Server URL
claudeAi.step3: Find fugle in the Connector list, click Connect to complete OAuth, and start chatting

claudeCode.title: Claude Code
claudeCode.description: Use in the terminal, the efficient choice for developers
claudeCode.step1: Copy the command below and run it in your terminal
claudeCode.step2: Restart Claude Code to load the new MCP Server
claudeCode.step3: Enter /mcp, select fugle to complete OAuth, and start chatting

platforms.note: Both services require Claude Pro plan or above. Connectors added on Claude.ai are also available in Claude Code

chatgpt.title: ChatGPT
chatgpt.description: ChatGPT integration coming soon, stay tuned

chatgpt.title: ChatGPT Users
chatgpt.step2: Search for "Fugle" and enable the App

developer.title: Developers
developer.step1: Install Claude Code or an MCP-compatible client
developer.step2: Connect to Fugle Remote MCP Server
developer.step3: Start using Taiwan stock data tools
